nasb.text: You will not be united with them in burial, Because you have ruined your country, You have slain your people. May the offspring of evildoers not be mentioned forever.

esv.text: You will not be joined with them in burial, because you have destroyed your land, you have slain your people. “May the offspring of evildoers nevermore be named!

cnv.text: 你必不得與別的君王同葬， 因為你敗壞了你的國， 殺戮了你的人民； 願那些惡人的後裔永遠不被人提說。

ccb.text: 你必得不到君王的葬礼， 因为你祸国殃民， 杀害自己的百姓。 “恶人的子孙必永远被遗忘。

csbs.text: 你必不能与其他君王同葬， 因为你毁坏了你的国， 杀戮了你的民。 愿作恶者的后裔永不被提起！
